governance_bootstrap.summary: Deployment SoT, completion evidence requirement before push.
Completion requires real entrypoint verification before reporting done.

problem: edu run 실행 결과 2개 버그 발견: (1) topic_registry 쿼리에서 created_at 컬럼 없음(실제: ingested_at), (2) 플래텀/한국경제/GoogleNews_학생진로AI 소스 entries 0.

changes.summary: ORDER BY created_at → ORDER BY ingested_at (raw_signals 실제 컬럼명)
플래텀_에듀테크, 한국경제 active:false. GoogleNews_학생진로AI URL 단순화(100 entries 확인).

verification.name: raw_signals 컬럼명 확인
verification.command: SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='raw_signals'

verification.name: edu run 410건 수집 성공
verification.command: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM raw_signals WHERE domain='edu_consulting' AND ingested_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes'
